reviews.review_description: The app says it requires an update, but the buttons don’t respond so it can’t update and can’t use the app at all. Rebooted, cleared cache, reinstalled the app, but nothing fixes it. Complete garbage.

The app worked okay until about a month ago.  It is completely non-functional now.  When you select a program it plays in a tiny upper left hand part of the screen which is in portrait mode.  It is not possible to change it.  The app has become useless.
The app now has stopped working altogether and when you uninstall it won’t install back on the Quest.
App was fine for a long time. Now it won't let me watch in full-screen. Please fix this.
Still no update shame on you
Cant watch it in fullscreen mode. Can only watch with small screen and channel guide below it.
I followed all directions  and can't save any favorite channels or shows. I keep getting error 9-300.
Sling TV is only showing in portrait mode. You can’t watch a TV app in portrait. The app has always had problems but this last is ridiculous.

This app has not been updated since release and it has been broken since then too. Can’t watch cloud DVR, can’t record, barely functional. I love sling but this is unacceptable at this point. Why even release an app if you’re going to abandon it immediately?
Great definition and experience.  My go to for watching now.

reviews.review_title: Errors loading favorites and DVR shows
reviews.review_description: I think Sling still has some tweaking to do, but upon sign in there were a few errors signing in and accessing favorites and my recordings. I really do like my Sling service, but the devs really need to tweak the app for better functionality.

What fool at Sling TV decided this should have been released? They should be ashamed. It doesn't even allow me to log in to my Sling account!!! I just get a message that says, "Technical difficulties, please try again later."
Nothing is adjustable, no environments, ads galore that you can't skip for 20$ a month. Virtual desktop takes a giant 10 thousand pounds sht on this garbage
